<image1>

determining whether no three remaining dots are collinear typically requires checking multiple line/group relationships among points
answer is not multiple-choice, so the solver likely must reason over the configuration rather than select from options
image was not directly inspected here, so score is kept moderate rather than very high

verification still depends on the unseen image geometry, so not scored at the maximum
